product: Empty vector search endpoints no longer incur charges
tagline: Vector search endpoints are now only charged after an index has been created, and 24 hours after the last index is deleted from the endpoint, the endpoint no longer incurs any charges.
what_it_does: Vector search endpoints are now only charged after an index has been created, and 24 hours after the last index is deleted from the endpoint, the endpoint no longer incurs any charges. AI Search bills for two resources: indexes that store your vectors for retrieval, and endpoints that serve queries. This page covers the following topics: AI Search index and endpoint basics.
key_takeaway: Vector search endpoints are now only charged after an index has been created, and 24 hours after the last index is deleted from the endpoint, the endpoint no longer incurs any charges.
